rationale: Gov't Code §2001.178 merely states that the APA subchapter on contested cases is cumulative of other statutory redress. It is procedural and unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
quote: This subchapter is cumulative of other means of redress provided by statute.
_note: No conflict; rule is a general procedural cumulative-effect provision with no bearing on Tax Code §11.13(b) exemption levels.
